messages.content: How is "Lim Siew Ling" spelled in Wades-Giles?
In Wades-Giles system, "Lim Siew Ling" is spelled as "Lim Siew Ling."
How is it spelled in Pinyin?
In Pinyin system, "Lim Siew Ling" is spelled as "Lín Xiǎolíng".
How is "Wong Boon Teck" spelled in Pinyin?
In Pinyin system, "Wong Boon Teck" is spelled as "Wáng Wēnzhāo".
"Sim Li Hua"
In Pinyin system, "Sim Li Hua" is spelled as "Sīm Lìhuā".
"Ng Ping Lee"
In Pinyin system, "Ng Ping Lee" is spelled as "Wu Pingli".
"Goh Han Je"
In Pinyin system, "Goh Han Je" is spelled as "Gao Hanjie".
"Gohan"
In Pinyin system, "Gohan" is spelled as "Gǎohàn".
"Toh Joo Ee"
In Pinyin system, "Toh Joo Ee" is spelled as "Du Zhuyi".
"Daniel Saranich"
In Pinyin system, "Daniel Saranich" would be spelled as "Dàniělǐ Sàláníkè".
"Tang Yu"
In Pinyin system, "Tang Yu" would be spelled as "Táng Yǔ".
